title: goodenia geniculata var. lanata
intro: Goodenia geniculata var. lanata, also known as woolly Goodenia, is a rare and endemic Australian plant that belongs to the Goodeniaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's leaves and stems are rich in flavonoids and glycosides, which contribute to its medicinal properties, offering relief from pain, swelling, and infection. Goodenia geniculata var. lanata can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a valuable resource in traditional Australian medicine.
